11546 Newton Rd, Bowling Green, OH 43402, USA
There is a large pear tree in small lot off to the side of the field. It's on the eastern edge.

They're found on and off down the road along the woods, but thickest at the edge where it borders the field. I've been gathering here for two years and the yeild has been excellent! Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-August.
This path gets mowed every year but the blackberries keep coming back. Nice little snack during the summer months. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-August.
